use_cases.name: NovaBento Analytics
use_cases.description: Analytics platform with asymmetric bento grid dashboard layout. Cards hover with 3D tilt and spotlight cursor-following. Animated counters, SVG chart reveals, glassmorphism sidebar. Dark mode with gradient mesh backgrounds.

design.vibe: Dark analytics with purple data viz and cyan accents, bento grid aesthetic

use_cases.name: GlassForge Studio
use_cases.description: Design collaboration platform with frosted glass UI throughout. Layered translucent panels over animated gradient backgrounds. Floating toolbars, blur-backed modals, depth-shifting on scroll. Light and dark mode with glass variants.

design.vibe: Frosted glass over deep purple gradient mesh, ethereal and layered

use_cases.name: MeshGlow Network
use_cases.description: Social networking platform with animated gradient mesh backgrounds that shift colors. Particle constellation connections between user nodes. Dark theme with vivid neon accents. Morphing SVG blob section dividers.

design.vibe: Deep black with neon pink and teal gradient meshes, constellation particles

use_cases.name: SpotlightAI Hub
use_cases.description: AI model management platform with cursor-following spotlight effects on all interactive elements. Radial gradient illumination on card borders. Beam tracing animations on navigation. Hover reveals with light sweep transitions.

design.vibe: Near-black with blue spotlight beams and amber glow, cinematic lighting

use_cases.name: PrismEdge Commerce
use_cases.description: E-commerce platform with spinning animated gradient borders on product cards. Conic gradient animations on CTAs. Rainbow shimmer on premium items. Animated border beam effects on featured products.

design.vibe: Dark with spinning rainbow gradient borders, prismatic light effects

use_cases.name: DimensionView Viewer
use_cases.description: Portfolio and showcase platform with 3D perspective-transform cards that tilt on hover. Multi-layer parallax depth within cards. Floating elements with z-translation. Orbit-style gallery navigation.

design.vibe: Dark space with indigo cards floating in perspective depth, 3D aesthetic

use_cases.name: QuickPulse Launcher
use_cases.description: Productivity platform centered around a command palette interface. Cmd+K opens everything. Fuzzy search, categorized actions, keyboard-first navigation. macOS dock-style app bar. Minimal chrome, maximum content.

design.vibe: Minimal light theme with spotlight command palette, macOS-inspired dock

use_cases.name: DockFlow Workspace
use_cases.description: Team workspace platform with macOS-style dock navigation at bottom. Icons magnify on proximity hover (fisheye effect). Spring physics animations. Tooltip reveals. Draggable dock items. Window-like panel management.

design.vibe: Deep indigo workspace with floating dock bar, macOS-style window management

use_cases.name: MosaicGrid Gallery
use_cases.description: Visual content platform with Pinterest-style masonry grid that infinite-scrolls. Variable-height cards with smooth layout transitions. Image reveal clip-path animations. Skeleton loaders. Category filter with layout shift animation.

design.vibe: Clean light gallery with red accent pins and green category tags, Pinterest-inspired

use_cases.name: SplitVision Docs
use_cases.description: Documentation platform with split-screen layout. Left panel sticky with interactive demo/preview, right panel scrolls through content. Left content morphs as scroll position changes sections. Sidebar progress indicator.

design.vibe: Clean documentation with navy text and sky blue links, split-pane IDE feel

use_cases.name: ScrollCraft Story
use_cases.description: Product showcase platform with Apple-style storytelling scroll. Full-viewport pinned sections with scroll-scrubbed animations. Text fades in/out tied to scroll position. Simulated video frame sequences via CSS gradient transitions. Parallax depth layers.

design.vibe: Pure black canvas with white text and rose highlights, Apple product page feel

use_cases.name: TerminalForge IDE
use_cases.description: Developer platform with terminal/code aesthetic throughout. Monospace typography, syntax-highlighted code blocks, typing animations, blinking cursors. Green-on-dark terminal theme with retro CRT scan lines. Command-line style navigation.

design.vibe: GitHub-dark terminal with green text and amber warnings, retro hacker aesthetic

use_cases.name: SoftCloud Interface
use_cases.description: Cloud management platform with neumorphic soft UI design. Elements appear extruded from or pressed into the surface. Dual-shadow technique for depth. Smooth press/toggle state transitions. Soft pastel color palette with subtle gradients.

design.vibe: Soft light gray neumorphic surface with indigo primary and coral alerts

use_cases.name: MetricPulse Dashboard
use_cases.description: Real-time metrics platform with animated counters that spring to target values on scroll. SVG chart path animations (stroke-dasharray). Progress rings that fill on reveal. Staggered data card animations. Live-updating number tickers.

design.vibe: Dark dashboard with emerald charts and amber KPI highlights, data-rich

use_cases.name: OrbitView Showcase
use_cases.description: Product showcase platform with interactive 3D scenes. CSS 3D transforms for product rotation on drag. Scroll-linked object rotation. Auto-rotate when idle. Environment reflections via gradient overlays. Click hotspots that reveal info panels.

design.vibe: Dark showcase with silver product highlights and purple accent lighting, premium

use_cases.name: StarField Connect
use_cases.description: Networking platform with canvas-rendered particle constellation background. Particles drift and connect with proximity lines. Cursor creates attraction/repulsion field. Color shifts on user interaction. Network graph visualization for connections.

design.vibe: Deep space black with cyan particles and purple connection lines, cosmic

use_cases.name: FluidShape Design
use_cases.description: Creative design platform with organic morphing SVG shapes as backgrounds and section dividers. Smooth blob animations that respond to scroll. Color gradient shifts over time. Clip-path image reveals with organic curves.

design.vibe: Soft pink canvas with fuchsia morphing blobs and purple organic shapes, fluid

use_cases.name: StreamTape Showcase
use_cases.description: Brand showcase platform with infinite-scrolling marquee tickers for logos, testimonials, and content strips. Multiple rows scrolling opposite directions. Gradient fade edges. Pause on hover. Variable speed layers creating depth.

design.vibe: Clean white with dark text marquees and rose highlight strips, dynamic motion

use_cases.name: RevealStack Layers
use_cases.description: Content platform where every section reveals with dramatic scroll-triggered animations. Clip-path unmask transitions, fade-up with stagger, text line-by-line reveal, image parallax offsets. The bread-and-butter of premium landing pages.

design.vibe: Dark canvas with white content revealing on scroll, gold accent highlights

use_cases.name: PanoScroll Gallery
use_cases.description: Immersive gallery platform where vertical scrolling translates to horizontal movement. Cards reveal and scale when centered. Parallax speed differences between layers. Snap points for discrete stops. Progress indicator showing gallery position.

design.vibe: Dark gallery with light cards and purple accent highlights, immersive horizontal flow
